areas.title: Wafer-scale Photonic Integrated Circuits
areas.description: Developing scalable photonic circuits at wafer-level for high-volume manufacturing.
areas.detailedDescription: Our research focuses on advancing wafer-scale photonic integration techniques that enable cost-effective, high-volume manufacturing of complex photonic systems. We work on novel fabrication processes, design automation, and quality control methods to push the boundaries of integrated photonics manufacturing.

areas.title: Highly-Performance Lasers
areas.description: Creating next-generation laser sources with exceptional efficiency and output characteristics.
areas.detailedDescription: We develop high-performance semiconductor lasers with superior power, efficiency, and spectral purity. Our work spans novel gain media, advanced cavity designs, and thermal management solutions for demanding applications.

areas.title: Laser-driven RF-Photonic Systems
areas.description: Bridging optical and radio-frequency domains for advanced signal processing.
areas.detailedDescription: Our research explores the intersection of laser technology and RF systems, developing integrated solutions for signal generation, processing, and distribution. We leverage photonic advantages for RF applications requiring high bandwidth and low noise.

areas.title: Large-scale Photonic Integration
areas.description: Advancing techniques for creating complex, highly-functional photonic circuits.
areas.detailedDescription: We develop scalable manufacturing processes and design methodologies for large-scale photonic integrated circuits. Our work enables the creation of complex photonic systems with hundreds of components on a single chip.

areas.title: GPS-free Navigation
areas.description: Developing photonic-based inertial navigation systems independent of satellite signals.
areas.detailedDescription: Our research focuses on creating high-precision inertial navigation systems using photonic technologies. We develop optical gyroscopes and accelerometers that provide reliable positioning in GPS-denied environments.

areas.title: Integrated Radar
areas.description: Creating compact, high-performance radar systems using photonic integration.
areas.detailedDescription: We develop integrated photonic radar systems that leverage the advantages of optical signal processing for enhanced range, resolution, and interference immunity. Our work combines microwave photonics with advanced integration techniques.

areas.title: Unification of the THz and the GHz/MHz
areas.description: Bridging terahertz and microwave frequency domains through photonic technologies.
areas.detailedDescription: Our research explores novel approaches to seamlessly connect the terahertz and microwave frequency regimes using photonic techniques. We develop sources, detectors, and signal processing methods that span this critical frequency gap.

collaboration.title: Interested in Collaboration?
collaboration.description: We're always open to new collaborations and partnerships. Whether you're from academia or industry, let's explore how we can work together to advance photonic technologies.
